Plot a MOAT audit risk dashboard

Source: R/plot-audit.R
autoplot.moat_audit.Rd

autoplot.moat_audit() provides the default visual summary for a moat_audit object. It shows module-level risk across design, batch, correction, and leakage diagnostics.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'moat_audit'
autoplot(object, ...)

Arguments

object

A moat_audit object.

...

Additional arguments passed to methods.

Value

A ggplot2::ggplot() object.

Examples

data("toy_moat")
audit <- moat(toy_moat, outcome = "outcome", batch = "batch", n_perm = 99)
ggplot2::autoplot(audit)
